description: Magento/Adobe Commerce vulnerability watch feed for C0defusi0n SecurityScanner. Intended to be produced out-of-band (e.g. a scheduled AI job aggregating Adobe APSB / NVD / Sansec). The module only consumes it. Always include the authoritative source 'url' so an admin can verify the AI-summarized item.

items.title: Adobe Commerce / Magento — unrestricted file upload (PolyShell)
items.summary: A crafted file upload can lead to arbitrary code execution. Apply the isolated security patch.
